quality.rationale: 四维散度定理结合空间超曲面拼接证明守恒荷标量性，逻辑链条清晰且具有一般场论普适性

origin.question: Problem 3.35. A vector field $\mathbf{J}^{\alpha}(\mathbf{x}^{\mu})$ satisfies $\mathbf{J}_{,\alpha}^{\alpha} = 0$ and $\mathbf{J}^{\alpha}$ falls off faster than $\mathbf{r}^{-2}$ at large distances from the origin. (a) Show that $\int \mathbf{J}^{0}\mathrm{d}^{3}\mathbf{x}$ is constant in time. (b) Show that the integral is a scalar, i.e. $\int \mathbf{J}^{0}\mathrm{d}^{3}\mathbf{x} = \int \mathbf{J}^{0}\mathrm{d}^{3}\mathbf{x}^{\prime}$ .
origin.solution: (b) The planes $\mathbf{x}^0 =$ constant, and $\mathbf{x}^{0'} =$ constant intersect forming two 4-dimensional regions: I and II. Close off these regions with spatial hypersurfaces at infinity forming two bounded 4-volumes. By Gauss' theorem, for region I$$0 = \int_{I} J^{\alpha},_{\alpha} d^{4} \Omega = 0 = \int_{I x^{0}} J^{0} d^{3} \Sigma_{0} - \int_{I x^{0^{\prime}}} J^{0^{\prime}} d^{3} \Sigma_{0}or$$$$\int_{\mathrm {I x}^{0}} \mathrm {J}^{0} \mathrm {d x} \mathrm {d y} \mathrm {d z} = \int_{\mathrm {I x}^{0^{\prime}}} \mathrm {J}^{0^{\prime}} \mathrm {d x}^{\prime} \mathrm {d y}^{\prime} \mathrm {d z}^{\prime},$$and similarly for region II. The proof is completed by adding the equations for the two regions.
